title: Videos with The Girls with Glasses
excerpt: The best thing about making more videos for you all is getting to know awesome creatives. The comments and community that's being cultivated through sharing in the video format on YouTube for me has been my favorite thing. I love…
body:
The best thing about making more videos for you all is getting to know awesome creatives. The comments and community that's being cultivated through sharing in the video format on YouTube for me has been my favorite thing. I love how supportive and positive it is (I was not so sure and nervous about it at first), but seriously it has been wonderful. 

I got a chance to collaborate with friends, Brooke + Summer of The Girls With Glasses and we shot a video in Venice sharing some tips for Instagram. Then they used my Finders Keepers collection to make a garland in their video!

Hope you enjoy and feel inspired to take more photos of the adventures with your friends and then craft something cool together!
